changeSet.author: intelligence-operative
changeSet.comment:
Fix view_riksdagen_party_transition_history: detect party transitions using assignment_data with party org_codes instead of vote_data.
ROOT CAUSE ANALYSIS: Previous approach (1.76-007) used vote_data.party LAG detection, but the Riksdagen API retroactively normalizes party codes to modern names: - FP (Folkpartiet) votes recorded as L (Liberalerna) - VPK votes recorded as V (Vänsterpartiet) - H - M votes recorded as M (Moderaterna) Result: 0 detectable transitions in 3.6M vote records.
NEW APPROACH: Use assignment_data where org_code matches known party codes (from sweden_political_party). Assignment records preserve historical party codes (FP, NYD, VPK, etc.) and track when politicians held party roles.
Detection methods (UNION): 1. assignment_data: Records where same person has different party org_codes over time (partiuppdrag, uppdrag with party org_code) 2. person_data cross-reference: Detect historical party names vs modern party codes using party name mapping
PARTY CODE MAPPING (historical → modern): - FP → L (Folkpartiet renamed Liberalerna, 2015) - VPK → V (Vänsterpartiet kommunisterna → Vänsterpartiet) - K - VPK → V (Kommunisterna) - BF - C → C (Bondeförbundet → Centerpartiet) - H - M → M (Högerpartiet → Moderaterna) - NYD → (defunct, Ny Demokrati dissolved ~2000)
DISTRIBUTION BALANCING: - assignment_data org_code party counts: KD(619),S(93),MP(69),M(44),C(41) - person_data.party: S(854),M(472),C(256),FP(191),MP(143) - Expected transitions: ~20-50 (party renames + genuine switches)
changeSet.sql:
DROP VIEW IF EXISTS public.view_riksdagen_party_transition_history CASCADE;
CREATE VIEW public.view_riksdagen_party_transition_history AS WITH known_parties AS ( -- Authoritative party codes from sweden_political_party table SELECT short_code FROM public.sweden_political_party WHERE short_code IS NOT NULL AND short_code <> '' AND short_code <> '-' UNION -- Historical party codes found in person_data.party but not in -- sweden_political_party (source: Riksdagen open data API person records) SELECT unnest(ARRAY['FP','NYD','VPK','K','H','BF','KrVP']) AS short_code ), party_name_map AS ( -- Official Swedish party name changes (source: Swedish Parliament records) -- Maps historical codes to their modern equivalents to distinguish -- party RENAMES from genuine political SWITCHES -- Note: Historical codes kept in SQL rather than sweden_political_party -- table to avoid side effects on other views that use that table SELECT * FROM (VALUES ('FP', 'L'), -- Folkpartiet → Liberalerna (renamed 2015) ('VPK', 'V'), -- Vänsterpartiet kommunisterna → Vänsterpartiet (1990) ('K - VPK', 'V'), -- Kommunisterna → VPK → Vänsterpartiet ('K', 'V'), -- Kommunisterna (historical) ('BF - C', 'C'), -- Bondeförbundet → Centerpartiet (renamed 1957) ('H - M', 'M') -- Högerpartiet → Moderaterna (renamed 1969) ) AS t(old_code, new_code) ), assignment_party_periods AS ( SELECT a.intressent_id AS person_id, a.org_code AS party, a.from_date, COALESCE(a.to_date, CURRENT_DATE) AS to_date, a.assignment_type, a.role_code, a.status FROM public.assignment_data a WHERE a.org_code IN (SELECT short_code FROM known_parties) AND a.from_date IS NOT NULL AND a.from_date >= '1990-01-01'::date ), person_party_timeline AS ( SELECT person_id, party, min(from_date) AS first_date, max(to_date) AS last_date FROM assignment_party_periods GROUP BY person_id, party ), transitions_raw AS ( SELECT t1.person_id, t1.party AS previous_party, t2.party AS new_party, t2.first_date AS transition_date FROM person_party_timeline t1 JOIN person_party_timeline t2 ON t1.person_id = t2.person_id AND t1.party <> t2.party AND t2.first_date > t1.first_date AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM person_party_timeline t3 WHERE t3.person_id = t1.person_id AND t3.party = t2.party AND t3.first_date > t1.first_date AND t3.first_date < t2.first_date ) WHERE COALESCE((SELECT pm.new_code FROM party_name_map pm WHERE pm.old_code = t1.party), t1.party) <> COALESCE((SELECT pm.new_code FROM party_name_map pm WHERE pm.old_code = t2.party), t2.party) ), vote_party_periods AS ( SELECT vd.embedded_id_intressent_id AS person_id, vd.party, min(vd.vote_date) AS first_vote_date, max(vd.vote_date) AS last_vote_date FROM public.vote_data vd WHERE vd.party IS NOT NULL AND vd.party <> '-' AND vd.party <> '' AND vd.vote_date IS NOT NULL AND vd.vote_date >= '2002-01-01'::date GROUP BY vd.embedded_id_intressent_id, vd.party HAVING count(*) >= 3 ), vote_transitions AS ( SELECT v1.person_id, v1.party AS previous_party, v2.party AS new_party, v2.first_vote_date AS transition_date FROM vote_party_periods v1 JOIN vote_party_periods v2 ON v1.person_id = v2.person_id AND v1.party <> v2.party AND v2.first_vote_date > v1.last_vote_date AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM vote_party_periods v3 WHERE v3.person_id = v1.person_id AND v3.first_vote_date > v1.last_vote_date AND v3.first_vote_date < v2.first_vote_date AND v3.party <> v1.party AND v3.party <> v2.party ) ), all_transitions AS ( SELECT person_id, previous_party, new_party, transition_date FROM transitions_raw UNION SELECT person_id, previous_party, new_party, transition_date FROM vote_transitions ), deduplicated AS ( SELECT person_id, previous_party, new_party, min(transition_date) AS transition_date FROM all_transitions GROUP BY person_id, previous_party, new_party ), election_proximity AS ( SELECT unnest(ARRAY[ '2002-09-15'::date, '2006-09-17'::date, '2010-09-19'::date, '2014-09-14'::date, '2018-09-09'::date, '2022-09-11'::date, '2026-09-13'::date ]) AS election_date ) SELECT dt.person_id, p.first_name, p.last_name, dt.previous_party, dt.new_party, dt.transition_date, CASE WHEN (SELECT pm.new_code FROM party_name_map pm WHERE pm.old_code = dt.previous_party) = COALESCE((SELECT pm.new_code FROM party_name_map pm WHERE pm.old_code = dt.new_party), dt.new_party) THEN 'PARTY_RENAMED'::text WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM public.vote_data vd WHERE (vd.embedded_id_intressent_id)::text = (dt.person_id)::text AND vd.vote_date >= (dt.transition_date - '60 days'::interval) AND vd.vote_date < dt.transition_date ) THEN 'SWITCHED_WHILE_SERVING'::text ELSE 'REJOINED_RIKSDAGEN'::text END AS transition_type, EXTRACT(year FROM dt.transition_date)::integer AS transition_year, ( SELECT min(ed.election_date) FROM election_proximity ed WHERE ed.election_date > dt.transition_date) AS next_election, (EXTRACT(year FROM age( (( SELECT min(ed.election_date) FROM election_proximity ed WHERE ed.election_date > dt.transition_date))::timestamp with time zone, dt.transition_date::timestamp with time zone)) * 12 + EXTRACT(month FROM age( (( SELECT min(ed.election_date) FROM election_proximity ed WHERE ed.election_date > dt.transition_date))::timestamp with time zone, dt.transition_date::timestamp with time zone)))::integer AS months_until_next_election, ( SELECT max(ed.election_date) FROM election_proximity ed WHERE ed.election_date < dt.transition_date) AS previous_election, (EXTRACT(year FROM age( dt.transition_date::timestamp with time zone, (( SELECT max(ed.election_date) FROM election_proximity ed WHERE ed.election_date < dt.transition_date))::timestamp with time zone)) * 12 + EXTRACT(month FROM age( dt.transition_date::timestamp with time zone, (( SELECT max(ed.election_date) FROM election_proximity ed WHERE ed.election_date < dt.transition_date))::timestamp with time zone)))::integer AS months_since_last_election FROM deduplicated dt JOIN public.person_data p ON (dt.person_id)::text = (p.id)::text ORDER BY dt.transition_date DESC;

changeSet.author: intelligence-operative
changeSet.comment:
Recreate view_riksdagen_party_defector_analysis after transition_history was rebuilt. Analyzes performance changes around party transitions using vote_data for attendance metrics.
Includes all transition types (SWITCHED_WHILE_SERVING, REJOINED_RIKSDAGEN, PARTY_RENAMED) to provide comprehensive defector analysis.
Uses 12-month pre/post windows for attendance comparison. Uses UPPER() normalization for vote comparison per codebase convention.
changeSet.sql:
DROP VIEW IF EXISTS public.view_riksdagen_party_defector_analysis CASCADE;
CREATE VIEW public.view_riksdagen_party_defector_analysis AS WITH defector_performance AS ( SELECT pt.person_id, pt.first_name, pt.last_name, pt.previous_party, pt.new_party, pt.transition_date, pt.transition_type, pt.months_until_next_election, round((avg( CASE WHEN vd.vote_date >= (pt.transition_date - '12 mons'::interval) AND vd.vote_date < pt.transition_date THEN CASE WHEN UPPER((vd.vote)::text) <> 'FRÅNVARANDE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ELSE NULL::integer END) * (100)::numeric), 2) AS pre_transition_attendance, round((avg( CASE WHEN vd.vote_date >= pt.transition_date AND vd.vote_date <= (pt.transition_date + '12 mons'::interval) THEN CASE WHEN UPPER((vd.vote)::text) <> 'FRÅNVARANDE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ELSE NULL::integer END) * (100)::numeric), 2) AS post_transition_attendance, count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN vd.vote_date < pt.transition_date AND vd.vote_date >= (pt.transition_date - '12 mons'::interval) THEN vd.embedded_id_ballot_id END) AS docs_before, count(DISTINCT CASE WHEN vd.vote_date >= pt.transition_date AND vd.vote_date <= (pt.transition_date + '12 mons'::interval) THEN vd.embedded_id_ballot_id END) AS docs_after FROM public.view_riksdagen_party_transition_history pt LEFT JOIN public.vote_data vd ON (pt.person_id)::text = (vd.embedded_id_intressent_id)::text GROUP BY pt.person_id, pt.first_name, pt.last_name, pt.previous_party, pt.new_party, pt.transition_date, pt.transition_type, pt.months_until_next_election ) SELECT person_id, first_name, last_name, previous_party, new_party, transition_date, months_until_next_election, pre_transition_attendance, post_transition_attendance, round(COALESCE(post_transition_attendance, 0) - COALESCE(pre_transition_attendance, 0), 2) AS attendance_change, docs_before, docs_after, CASE WHEN months_until_next_election IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN_TIMING'::text WHEN months_until_next_election <= 12 THEN 'PRE_ELECTION_DEFECTION'::text WHEN months_until_next_election >= 36 THEN 'MID_TERM_DEFECTION'::text ELSE 'NORMAL_DEFECTION'::text END AS defection_timing FROM defector_performance ORDER BY transition_date DESC;

changeSet.author: intelligence-operative
changeSet.comment:
Recreate view_riksdagen_party_switcher_outcomes after transition_history was rebuilt. Tracks career outcomes for politicians who switched parties.
Matches all subsequent assignments after transition date and evaluates: - Whether politician continued as active MP - Whether they served in the next election cycle - Whether they attained leadership positions post-switch
changeSet.sql:
DROP VIEW IF EXISTS public.view_riksdagen_party_switcher_outcomes CASCADE;
CREATE VIEW public.view_riksdagen_party_switcher_outcomes AS WITH switcher_subsequent_assignments AS ( SELECT pt.person_id, pt.first_name AS pt_first_name, pt.last_name AS pt_last_name, pt.previous_party, pt.new_party, pt.transition_date, pt.next_election, pt.months_until_next_election, a.from_date AS subsequent_from_date, a.to_date AS subsequent_to_date, a.status AS subsequent_status, a.role_code AS subsequent_role, a.assignment_type AS subsequent_assignment_type, CASE WHEN a.to_date IS NULL THEN CURRENT_DATE - a.from_date ELSE a.to_date - a.from_date END AS days_in_subsequent_role, CASE WHEN pt.next_election IS NOT NULL AND a.from_date <= pt.next_election AND (a.to_date IS NULL OR a.to_date >= pt.next_election) THEN true ELSE false END AS served_in_next_election_cycle FROM public.view_riksdagen_party_transition_history pt LEFT JOIN public.assignment_data a ON (pt.person_id)::text = (a.intressent_id)::text AND a.from_date >= pt.transition_date ) SELECT ssa.person_id, ssa.pt_first_name AS first_name, ssa.pt_last_name AS last_name, ssa.previous_party, ssa.new_party, ssa.transition_date, ssa.next_election, ssa.months_until_next_election, count(DISTINCT ssa.subsequent_from_date) AS total_subsequent_assignments, sum(ssa.days_in_subsequent_role) AS total_days_served_after_switch, max(CASE WHEN (ssa.subsequent_status)::text = 'Tjänstgörande'::text THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS continued_as_active_mp, max(CASE WHEN ssa.served_in_next_election_cycle = true THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS served_in_next_election, max(CASE WHEN (ssa.subsequent_role)::text = ANY (ARRAY[ 'Partiledare'::text, 'Gruppledare'::text, 'Partisekreterare'::text, 'Ordförande'::text, 'Vice ordförande'::text ]) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS attained_leadership_post_switch, string_agg(DISTINCT (ssa.subsequent_role)::text, ', '::text) FILTER (WHERE ssa.subsequent_role IS NOT NULL) AS post_switch_roles, max((p.status)::text) AS current_status FROM switcher_subsequent_assignments ssa LEFT JOIN public.person_data p ON (ssa.person_id)::text = (p.id)::text GROUP BY ssa.person_id, ssa.pt_first_name, ssa.pt_last_name, ssa.previous_party, ssa.new_party, ssa.transition_date, ssa.next_election, ssa.months_until_next_election ORDER BY ssa.transition_date DESC;

changeSet.author: intelligence-operative
changeSet.comment:
Fix view_election_cycle_anomaly_pattern timeout caused by Cartesian joins.
ROOT CAUSE: full_schema.sql contains the pre-1.65 view definition with ON (1=1) Cartesian joins, but databasechangelog marks 1.65-010 as EXECUTED. When Liquibase runs on CI, it skips the fix (already marked done), leaving the broken view.
The Cartesian product is: - election_cycle_periods (~37 rows) - × view_risk_score_evolution (8,599 rows) [properly joined on year] - × view_riksdagen_voting_anomaly_detection (1,064 rows) [ON 1=1 !!] - × view_politician_risk_summary (403 rows) [ON 1=1 !!] = ~129 BILLION intermediate rows before aggregation → TIMEOUT
FIX: Pre-aggregate anomaly and risk statistics into scalar subqueries, eliminating the Cartesian product while preserving all output columns.
PERCENTILE BALANCING: - voting_anomaly: total_rebellions median=12, p75=27 - risk_score_evolution: ballot_count median=42 - politician_risk_summary: total_violations median=5, p75=7
changeSet.sql:
DROP VIEW IF EXISTS public.view_election_cycle_anomaly_pattern CASCADE;
CREATE VIEW public.view_election_cycle_anomaly_pattern AS WITH election_cycle_periods AS ( SELECT ((1994::numeric + FLOOR(((year_series - 1994)::numeric / 4.0)) * 4::numeric) || '-' || (1994::numeric + FLOOR(((year_series - 1994)::numeric / 4.0)) * 4::numeric + 4::numeric)) AS election_cycle_id, ((year_series::numeric - (1994::numeric + FLOOR(((year_series - 1994)::numeric / 4.0)) * 4::numeric)) + 1::numeric) AS cycle_year, year_series AS calendar_year FROM generate_series(1994, EXTRACT(year FROM CURRENT_DATE)::integer + 4, 1) AS year_series ), anomaly_stats AS ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT person_id) FILTER (WHERE anomaly_classification IN ('FREQUENT_STRONG_REBEL', 'CONSISTENT_REBEL')) AS high_anomaly_count, ROUND(AVG(total_rebellions), 2) AS avg_total_rebellions, COUNT(DISTINCT person_id) FILTER (WHERE strong_consensus_rebellions >= 5) AS strong_consensus_rebels FROM public.view_riksdagen_voting_anomaly_detection ), risk_stats AS ( SELECT ROUND(AVG(risk_score), 2) AS avg_risk_score_prs, COUNT(DISTINCT person_id) FILTER (WHERE risk_level IN ('HIGH', 'CRITICAL')) AS high_risk_politicians FROM public.view_politician_risk_summary ), v_base AS ( SELECT ecp.election_cycle_id, ecp.cycle_year, ecp.calendar_year, CASE WHEN EXTRACT(month FROM rse.assessment_period) >= 9 OR EXTRACT(month FROM rse.assessment_period) <= 1 THEN 'autumn'::text ELSE 'spring'::text END AS semester, 'MULTI_SOURCE_PATTERN'::text AS anomaly_type, COUNT(DISTINCT rse.person_id) FILTER (WHERE rse.risk_severity IN ('HIGH', 'CRITICAL')) AS politician_count_with_risk, ROUND(AVG(rse.risk_score), 2) AS avg_risk_score, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE rse.severity_transition LIKE 'ESCALATION%') AS risk_escalations, (SELECT high_anomaly_count FROM anomaly_stats) AS high_anomaly_count, (SELECT avg_total_rebellions FROM anomaly_stats) AS avg_total_rebellions, (SELECT strong_consensus_rebels FROM anomaly_stats) AS strong_consensus_rebels, (SELECT avg_risk_score_prs FROM risk_stats) AS avg_risk_score_prs, (SELECT high_risk_politicians FROM risk_stats) AS high_risk_politicians FROM election_cycle_periods ecp LEFT JOIN public.view_risk_score_evolution rse ON EXTRACT(year FROM rse.assessment_period) = ecp.calendar_year::numeric GROUP BY ecp.election_cycle_id, ecp.cycle_year, ecp.calendar_year, CASE WHEN EXTRACT(month FROM rse.assessment_period) >= 9 OR EXTRACT(month FROM rse.assessment_period) <= 1 THEN 'autumn'::text ELSE 'spring'::text END ORDER BY ecp.election_cycle_id, ecp.cycle_year, CASE WHEN EXTRACT(month FROM rse.assessment_period) >= 9 OR EXTRACT(month FROM rse.assessment_period) <= 1 THEN 'autumn'::text ELSE 'spring'::text END ), windowed AS ( SELECT v.election_cycle_id, v.cycle_year, v.calendar_year, v.semester, v.anomaly_type, v.politician_count_with_risk, v.avg_risk_score, v.risk_escalations, v.high_anomaly_count, v.avg_total_rebellions, v.strong_consensus_rebels, v.avg_risk_score_prs, v.high_risk_politicians, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY v.election_cycle_id ORDER BY v.avg_risk_score DESC NULLS LAST) AS rank_by_risk, RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY v.election_cycle_id ORDER BY v.high_anomaly_count DESC NULLS LAST) AS rank_by_anomalies, PERCENT_RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY v.election_cycle_id ORDER BY v.avg_risk_score DESC NULLS LAST) AS percent_rank_risk, NTILE(4) OVER (PARTITION BY v.election_cycle_id ORDER BY v.avg_risk_score DESC NULLS LAST) AS ntile_risk_level, LAG(v.avg_risk_score) OVER (PARTITION BY v.election_cycle_id ORDER BY v.cycle_year, v.semester) AS prev_semester_risk, LAG(v.high_anomaly_count) OVER (PARTITION BY v.election_cycle_id ORDER BY v.cycle_year, v.semester) AS prev_semester_anomalies FROM v_base v ) SELECT election_cycle_id, cycle_year, calendar_year, semester, anomaly_type, politician_count_with_risk, avg_risk_score, risk_escalations, high_anomaly_count, avg_total_rebellions, strong_consensus_rebels, avg_risk_score_prs, high_risk_politicians, rank_by_risk, rank_by_anomalies, percent_rank_risk, ntile_risk_level, prev_semester_risk, prev_semester_anomalies, CASE WHEN prev_semester_risk IS NOT NULL AND prev_semester_risk > 0::numeric THEN ROUND(((avg_risk_score - prev_semester_risk) / prev_semester_risk) * 100::numeric, 2) ELSE NULL::numeric END AS change_risk_pct, CASE WHEN prev_semester_anomalies IS NOT NULL AND prev_semester_anomalies > 0 THEN ROUND(((high_anomaly_count - prev_semester_anomalies)::numeric / prev_semester_anomalies::numeric) * 100::numeric, 2) ELSE NULL::numeric END AS change_anomalies_pct, CASE WHEN prev_semester_risk IS NULL THEN 'baseline'::text WHEN avg_risk_score > prev_semester_risk + 10::numeric THEN 'escalating'::text WHEN avg_risk_score < prev_semester_risk - 10::numeric THEN 'improving'::text ELSE 'stable'::text END AS risk_trend, CASE WHEN prev_semester_anomalies IS NOT NULL THEN high_anomaly_count - prev_semester_anomalies ELSE 0::bigint END AS anomaly_acceleration FROM windowed w;
